channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Houthi attacks on Saudi tankers heighten Red Sea oil supply risks
item.description: The Iranian-aligned Houthis claimed military strikes on two Saudi oil tankers, escalating tensions in the Red Sea and raising concerns over global oil supply disruptions. The attacks, which targeted t...

item.title: JI Secretary General Ameerul Azeem passes away after cancer battle
item.description: The article reports the passing of Ameerul Azeem, the Secretary General of Jamaat-i-Islami (JI) Pakistan, who died after a prolonged battle with cancer. According to the party's statement, Azeem conti...

item.title: Attendee mocks Trump during his Georgia rally as White House faces criticism over security oversight
item.description: A journalist highlighted how President Donald Trump was 'mocked ruthlessly' during his own rally in Marietta, Georgia, where an attendee mimicked his movements. The incident occurred at a high school ...

item.title: Today's Key Nigerian News Headlines
item.description: The article compiles today's top Nigerian news, covering politics, economy, and culture. President Tinubu is praised by Trump for his leadership in Nigeria, while the APC faces internal challenges ove...

item.title: Marcos assures Bangsamoro polls will proceed despite security threats
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. has vowed to proceed with the long-delayed Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao (BARMM) parliamentary elections on September 14, despite ongoing security thre...

item.title: Prosecutors present forensic evidence in D4vd's murder trial
item.description: During the preliminary hearing for D4vd (David Burke), prosecutors presented forensic evidence, including apparent bloodstains and DNA samples, from Burke's Hollywood home garage and his Tesla. Crimin...

item.title: Democrat Amish Shah wins Arizona House primary in key battleground district
item.description: Former Arizona state representative Amish Shah secured the Democratic nomination for the 1st Congressional District in a closely contested primary, defeating establishment-backed candidate Marlene Gal...

item.title: 35 Funny and Inappropriate Posts from Older Adults on Social Media
item.description: This article compiles a list of 35 humorous and socially awkward posts made by older adults on various online platforms, showcasing their unique perspectives and interactions with modern technology. E...

item.title: Kenya Weather Forecast Predicts Rain in 26 Counties Including Nairobi
item.description: The Kenya Meteorological Department has issued a 24-hour weather forecast covering 26 counties, predicting a mix of partly cloudy skies, sunny intervals, and rainfall. The forecast highlights varying ...

item.title: Pauline Hanson's Remarks on Domestic Violence Risk Women's Safety
item.description: Senator Pauline Hanson's recent comments downplaying domestic violence as a 'two-way street' have sparked significant concern. Her remarks, which blame the cost of living for perpetrators' actions and...

item.title: Regina Hospitals Still Struggling with Hand Hygiene Compliance Despite 2018 Recommendations
item.description: A follow-up audit by provincial auditor Tara Clemett reveals Regina hospitals have failed to address long-standing hand hygiene issues since 2018. As of December 2025, 43% of hospital units still have...

item.title: Culinary twins share family recipes and cooking tips on new show
item.description: Lebo and Tebo Ndala, twin sisters and founders of the With Love From The Twins food brand, launch their weekly cooking show 'Twice as Nice: With Love From The Twins' on The Home Channel. The series ai...

item.title: Political Reconciliation and Infrastructure Developments in Tanzania
item.description: The article highlights two key developments in Tanzania on July 23, 2026. First, an analyst praised the CCM-ACT-Wazalendo reconciliation as a sign of political maturity, indicating progress in resolvi...

item.title: Cross River State Passes Same-Sex Marriage Ban Bill Amid Legal Challenge
item.description: Cross River State House of Assembly passed a bill banning same-sex marriage and civil unions for second reading, despite legal challenges over the state's constitutional authority. The legislation, sp...

item.title: The Odyssey's Box Office Success Overshadows Right-Wing Backlash
item.description: Christopher Nolan's adaptation of Homer's 'Odyssey' has defied predictions of failure, amassing $264 million in its opening weekend despite fierce criticism from Elon Musk and right-wing commentators....

item.title: Chris Kirubi's Bendor Farm: A Look at Kenya's Largest Banana Plantation
item.description: Chris Kirubi's Bendor Farm in Thika, Kenya, is a 1,000-acre agricultural estate that showcases his vision for food security and long-term land investment. The farm, which spans 1,000 acres, features a...

item.title: Lalit Modi cleared of 2009 IPL South Africa legal dispute after 16-year tribunal ruling
item.description: Former Indian Premier League chairman Lalit Modi has been cleared of charges related to the 2009 IPL tournament held in South Africa after a 16-year legal battle. The Appellate Tribunal under SAFEMA o...

item.title: U.S. and Saudi Arabia Announce Civilian Nuclear Cooperation Agreement
item.description: The United States has signed a landmark agreement with Saudi Arabia to establish a civilian nuclear program, emphasizing safeguards against nuclear proliferation. The deal, announced under Section 123...

item.title: Tanzania's Prof Kabudi Urges Timely Completion of DMDP Projects
item.description: The article highlights Tanzanian President Prof Kabudi's directive to ensure the quality and timely completion of all Development Management and Planning (DMDP) projects. The focus is on improving inf...

item.title: Macquarie Appoints Greg Ward as CEO Following Shemara Wikramanayake's Retirement
item.description: Macquarie Group has appointed Greg Ward, head of its banking and financial services division, as the new chief executive, succeeding Shemara Wikramanayake who is stepping down after eight years in the...
